symptoms.symptom_name: Chest tightness with breathlessness and sense of impending doom

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Somatic chest symptoms are a core feature of panic.
Chest tightness plus breathlessness cannot be attributed to panic until a cardiac cause is excluded by ECG/troponin.
Classic sympathetic activation of a panic attack.
Palpitations may reflect a primary arrhythmia; only an ECG distinguishes it.
Tremor and tachycardia can indicate hyperthyroidism.

symptoms.symptom_name: Onset at rest after a psychosocial trigger

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A clear psychological precipitant at rest is characteristic of panic.
Non-exertional onset lowers, but does not remove, cardiac probability.

symptoms.symptom_name: No radiation to arm/jaw and no exertional relationship (pertinent negative)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of radiation and exertional pattern reduces likelihood of typical ischaemia but does not exclude ACS.

symptoms.symptom_name: In-person vitals — BP 148/92, HR 112 regular, RR 24, SpO2 98%, afebrile

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sympathetic tachycardia/hypertension consistent with panic — but these are clinician-measured and unavailable remotely; the normal SpO2 reassures against hypoxaemia.
A measured pulse cannot distinguish sinus tachycardia from an arrhythmia without an ECG.

symptoms.symptom_name: Housebound avoidance, hypervigilance and reluctance to be documented

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Marked avoidance and hypervigilance around disclosure are hallmark features of social anxiety.

symptoms.symptom_name: No stimulant or illicit substance use (pertinent negative)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Denial of stimulant/illicit use lowers the probability of a sympathomimetic toxidrome.
Hopelessness in the context of severe anxiety and social isolation is a mental-health risk requiring active screening and safety-netting.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Together strongly suggest panic, but the somatic chest/cardiac overlap keeps the cardiac mimic live until excluded in person.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To exclude acute coronary syndrome and distinguish sinus tachycardia from an arrhythmia — cannot be obtained via telehealth.
To exclude myocardial injury given undifferentiated chest symptoms.
First-presentation anxiety with tremor and tachycardia warrants later exclusion of thyrotoxicosis.
